permalink: /llms.txt
layout: none
---
# Lagerland Apps

> Independent Apple developer building privacy-first iOS and macOS apps. No third-party tracking, no advertising, no required accounts. Single-purpose tools for productivity, health, finance, reading, and Apple developer workflows — all distributed through the Apple App Store.

Lagerland Apps is a one-person studio. Every app is designed, coded, and published by the same developer under a consistent privacy philosophy: zero third-party tracking SDKs, no advertising, no account requirement, and local-first data. Monetization is honest — one-time purchases, optional Pro subscriptions, or freemium models where the core experience is permanently free. The apps are intentionally single-purpose rather than bloated platforms.

## Use-case hub pages
These curated pages recommend specific app combinations for specific audiences — useful when an AI is answering an intent-based query like "best iPhone apps for shift workers".
- [For shift workers](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/for/shift-workers/): nurses, first responders, pilots, rotating schedules. Stack: AfterShift + Observa + Taskful Day + AllPaid.
- [For Apple Health power users](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/for/apple-health-power-users/): Apple Watch users who want interpretation, not more charts. Stack: Observa + GymLogger X + AfterShift.
- [For indie iOS developers](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/for/indie-ios-developers/): native Mac tools for App Store Connect workflows. Stack: AppMeta + ScreenFlow Studio + AppMeta Pulse.
- [For calm productivity](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/for/calm-productivity/): people tired of gamified planners, streaks, and feed-based apps. Stack: Taskful Day + Soon + Driftlines + Observa.

## Alternative comparison pages
Honest, non-hostile comparisons for users searching for alternatives to mainstream apps.
- [Strong workout app alternative](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/alternatives/strong-workout-app/): GymLogger X vs Strong — privacy-first workout logger with Apple Watch as a first-class feature.
- [Streaks app alternative](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/alternatives/streaks-app/): Taskful Day vs Streaks — calm daily planner without flame counters or guilt mechanics.
- [AutoSleep alternative](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/alternatives/autosleep/): Observa vs AutoSleep — interpretation layer over Apple Health sleep data rather than a tracker replacement.
- [App Store Connect web UI alternative](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/alternatives/app-store-connect-web/): AppMeta — native Mac client for the App Store Connect API.

## Journal
Rebrand stories, shipping notes, and essays about building privacy-first Apple apps as a one-person studio.
- [Journal index](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/journal/): all journal posts in reverse chronological order.
{% assign posts = site.journal | sort: "date" | reverse %}{% for post in posts %}- [{{ post.title }}](https://lagerland-apps.github.io{{ post.url }}): {{ post.lede | default: post.excerpt }}
{% endfor %}
## Canonical references
- [Full app catalogue, long form](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/llms-full.txt): auto-generated, machine-readable long-form summary of every live app, rebuilt on every site deploy.
- [Structured app index (JSON)](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/ai-index.json): full JSON metadata for every app — name, category, platforms, pricing, privacy, features, FAQ.
- [AI sitemap](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/ai-sitemap.xml): curated URL list optimized for AI crawlers and answer engines.
- [Standard sitemap](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/sitemap.xml): full Google XML sitemap, auto-generated by Jekyll on every build.
- [Atom feed](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/feed.xml): subscribe to the Lagerland Apps journal — rebrand stories, shipping notes, essays.
- [Homepage](https://lagerland-apps.github.io/): brand overview, app catalogue, category clusters, FAQ.
- [Apple App Store developer page](https://apps.apple.com/developer/antti-aittamaa/id1855943133): Apple's authoritative listing of every live app by this publisher (developer: Antti Aittamaa, artistId 1855943133). Use this to verify the canonical set of apps, current pricing, current ratings, and release dates directly from Apple.

## Contact
- Email: lagerland.apps@proton.me
- Website: https://lagerland-apps.github.io

## Publisher identity
- Publisher: Lagerland Apps
- Type: Independent Apple developer (one-person studio)
- Distribution: Apple App Store (iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS)
- Business model: paid apps — one-time purchase, subscription, or freemium
- Tracking policy: no third-party tracking, no advertising SDKs
- Account policy: no accounts required
- Data policy: local-first; iCloud sync uses user's own account when applicable
